description_long: This is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a wooden stock and fore-end paired with a blued steel receiver and barrel. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, with a smooth, polished wood finish and a black rubber buttpad for recoil absorption. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a tubular magazine running parallel beneath it, typical of shotguns designed for multiple shell capacity. The receiver is compact and metallic, with a visible trigger guard and loading port. Iron sights are mounted on top of the barrel for aiming, and the muzzle end is simple, lacking any advanced attachments. The overall appearance is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for both civilian and law enforcement use in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, blued steel barrel, and iron sights. It has a tubular magazine and a classic, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the blued steel barrel with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view showing the circular muzzle, tubular magazine below, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wooden stock, fore-end, and metallic receiver with clear detail of the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
